description: Letter from Abu Nasr b. Ibrahim, Alexandria, to his partner Abu Ishaq the nāʾib (deputy). Dating: 11 May 1141. The first page of the letter (which originally contained three pages) is lost. The letter deals with commercial matters, taxes, political issues regarding the farming of taxes and information on the affair between Yehuda ha-Levi and the convert b. Basri. See
description_he: מכתב מאבו נצר בן אברהים, מאלכסנדריה, לשותפו הנאיב, 11 מאי 1141, על מסחר, מסים ויהודה הלוי
